Bahrain: Several Iranian aerial attacks intercepted. No casualties or damage reported by the cutoff. Omani waters: Al Bahyah and Mombasa B struck by Iranian cruise missiles. 1 Indian seafarer killed; 8 crew injured. CENTCOM’s figure of 7 ships attacked and nearly a dozen civilians killed, missing or injured covers the previous 7 days, not 14-15 July alone. Assessment: Attacks confirmed.
